5.0.short_description: Ball will fully fall within this box, such that they will not overlap the box faces or edges. By default, the box is the model domain

keywords.name: ball.generate.group
keywords.description: Specify that generated balls are given group name <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: ball.generate.id
keywords.description: The ID of the first ball generated is set to <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: ball.generate.number
keywords.description: Specify the number of balls to be generated

keywords.name: ball.generate.radius
keywords.description: Specify the radius range to be used during generation

keywords.name: ball.generate.tries
keywords.description: Number of tries to fill the specified region with the number of balls

examples.command: ; setup model domain and CMAT domain extent - 10.0 10.0 condition periodic cmat default model linear method deformability emod 1e6 kratio 1.25 property fric 0.25 ; generate balls set random 10001 ; set the seed of the random number generator to ensure repeatability ball generate radius 0.5 0.7 number 100 box - 5.0 0.0 - 5.0 5.0 ball generate radius 1.0 1.4 number 100 box 0.0 5.0 - 5.0 5.0

; create a surrounding box, assign density and local damping attributes wall generate box - 6.0 6.0 ball attribute density 1000.0 damp 0.7 ; set gravity magnitude and solve set gravity 10.0 solve arat 1e-3

domain extent - 15.0 15.0 set random 10001 ball generate id 1 200 ... radius 0.5 0.6 ... box - 15.0 - 5.0 - 5.0 5.0 ... range sphere center - 10.0 0.0 0.0 radius 5.0 ball generate id 201 400 ... radius 0.5 0.6 ... gauss ... box 5.0 15.0 - 5.0 5.0 ... range sphere center 10.0 0.0 0.0 radius 5.0
